rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>你还真是个怪人啊，居然特地爬上来。<unk[5:0]>
下面明明热闹多了。
我叫泰德。

我是从监视堡垒<Color=red>东南方<Color=white>很～远很远的
<Color=red>哈特诺村<Color=white>那儿来的，
我有点担心留在村里的家人们，
所以还是会不自觉地朝往村子那边望。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>你居然特地爬到這裡來，真是好奇心旺盛耶，<unk[5:0]>
下面明明更熱鬧啊。
我是泰德。

我來自一個名叫<Color=red>哈特諾村<Color=white>的地方，
位在監視堡壘的遙遠<Color=red>東南方<Color=white>。
我有點擔心還留在村裡的家人，
所以我就會忍不住一直往村子的方向看。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>わざわざここに<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>上ってくるたぁ <Ruby={4:6}ものず>物好きだな<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}した>下の<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方が <Ruby={2:4}にぎ>賑やかだろうに
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺はタデってんだ

<Ruby={6:12}かんしとりで>監視砦から ずーっと<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}なんとう>南東<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}い>行った<Ruby={2:6}ところ>所にある
<Color=red>ハテノ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>ってとこから <Ruby={2:2}き>来たんだが
ちょいと <Ruby={2:4}むら>村に<Ruby={2:2}お>置いてきた<Ruby={4:6}かぞく>家族が<Ruby={4:8}しんぱい>心配でな<unk[5:0]>
ついつい <Ruby={2:4}むら>村の<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方を<Ruby={2:2}み>見ちゃうんだよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You're a curious one, being up here
when everyone's down below.<unk[5:0]>
The name's Thadd.
I'm from a place that's almost as far
to the <Color=red>southeast<Color=white> as you can get from
here. It's called <Color=red>Hateno Village<Color=white>.
I've been worried about my family back
home. So if you catch me sneaking a
peek thataway, <unk[5:0]>well, that's why.

rows.CNzh:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:11]>哇啊！<Size=100>

啊不，我可没有走神儿往老家那边看啊，<unk[5:0]>
我在好好监视怪物呢……
……
……
<unk[3:0:10]>你看嘛，<unk[5:0]>在这儿监视怪物的时候，
<Color=red>那座圆环状的遗迹<Color=white>总会映入眼帘，
而我的老家<Color=red>哈特诺村<Color=white>
刚好就在那个方向……
<Color=grey><Size=80>……泰麦娜……泰奇波……<unk[5:0]>
不知道过得还好吗……<Size=100><Color=white>

……
……
<unk[3:0:10]>雖說如此，每當我在這裡監視怪物時，

也剛好是在那個方向喔……
<Color=grey><Size=80>……泰麥娜……泰奇波……
不知道他們過得好不好……<Size=100><Color=white>

<Size=125><unk[3:0:11]>ぬぉっと！<Size=100>

rows.USen:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:11]>Gah!<Size=100>


I was NOT just gazing off toward my
hometown. Of course not. I'm on the
lookout for monsters.
...


<unk[3:0:10]>Problem is, when I keep watch from
here, I see the<Color=red> ring-shaped ruins<Color=white> in
the distance.
Just so happens that <Color=red>Hateno Village<Color=white> is
out that way, beyond the horizon.

<Color=grey><Size=80>Tamana... Teebo... Tell me you're all right...<Size=100><Color=white>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的村子受过
塞尔达殿下不少帮助，
所以我就来到了这里，
想竭尽所能提供一些帮助。
<unk[3:0:12]>但我还是有些担心留在<Color=red>哈特诺村<Color=white>的
老婆和儿子啊……
哈特诺村刚好就在<Color=red>圆环状遗迹<Color=white>的方向上，<unk[5:0]>
所以我就会不自觉地朝那边看……
<unk[3:0:267]>啊，但我还是在认真监视的，<unk[5:0]>
这你就放一万个心吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>薩爾達殿下
相當關照我的村子。
所以才會來到這裡，
希望自己也能多少幫上一點忙。
<unk[3:0:12]>但是我很擔心
留在<Color=red>哈特諾村<Color=white>裡的妻子跟兒子……
那座<Color=red>環狀遺跡<Color=white>的所在位置剛好跟村子的方向一樣，
所以我就會忍不住一直往那邊看。
<unk[3:0:267]>啊，不過我也有好好地在監視，
這件事你大可放心！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>My village is indebted to Princess Zelda.


I wanted to offer some kind of assistance
in return, so I came here.

<unk[3:0:12]>But I'm worried sick about my wife and
son back in <Color=red>Hateno Village<Color=white>...

That's far beyond those <Color=red>ring-shaped
ruins<Color=white> in the distance, so I keep looking
out that way.
<unk[3:0:267]>But I'm keeping proper watch, don't
you worry!

<Color=red>哈特诺村<Color=white>刚好就在那个方向上。
所以在这里监视怪物的话，
<Color=red>即使不想看也会看到<Color=white>啊。
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>害我想起留在老家的家人们了。<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>Have you seen the <Color=red>ring-shaped ruins<Color=white> on
the horizon? <unk[5:0]>They're off to the southeast.

But when I'm looking out that way, I'm
thinking of what's beyond the ruins—
my dear <Color=red>Hateno Village<Color=white>.
So, I'm keeping watch for monsters, of
course, but I also keep <Color=red>seeing those
strange ruins<Color=white>...
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>Which then leads me to worry more about
my family, who I left behind so I could
help out here...
<Color=grey><Size=80>Tamana... Teebo... <unk[5:0]>Please be all right...<Size=100><Color=white>
